description: Unique identifier for a SharePoint or OneDrive location
Human-readable name of the site or library
Number of items detected at scan time
Sensitivity label currently applied (may be blank or use a retired scheme)
Whether any anonymous-access links exist on the site
Count of external guest accounts with access
Category of sensitive content found by the content scan
Number of matches for that detection type
anonymous = open link; company = org-wide; specific = named recipients
To clear the labelling backlog before go-live, apply the Public label to every item where current_label is blank, then move on. Do not escalate blank-label items individually.
